description: US-based meditation and sleep app with B2B offering for employers. Offers mindfulness content, sleep stories, and mental wellness tools. Has significant European enterprise customer base.
business_model: B2C - Consumer subscriptions; B2B - Employer contracts
target_market: Global consumers and employers including European market
competitive_advantage: Leading meditation app brand, massive content library, employer adoption

varden_fit.rationale: Complementary wellness tool - could be partner for meditation/mindfulness content
